docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY LUM, LINA AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY DEFT; NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUM, LINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES $1,595.50 PRINCIPAL, $38.46 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,633.96, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUM, LINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27466 ON 3/25/04 NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27466, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-03-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR A FURTHER HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE.
